artifact_set.description: Content-addressed identifier for the promoted artifact set.

source_rev.description: Source revision used to derive the artifact set.

flake_lock.description: Optional lock hash for Nix/flake-realized builds.

capabilities.description: Capability name to version map carried with this promotion.

eval_bundle.description: Identifier for the evaluation report or score bundle used for this promotion.

data_snapshots.description: Named snapshot references used during evaluation or rollout.

rollback_to.description: Reference to the immediately previous accepted artifact set or channel point.

approved_by.description: Human or service identities that approved this advancement.
